title: Services Norwegian movers often use for the Netherlands
intro: Housing, relocation help, banking, and insurance come first for typical EEA moves—immigration services are optional for special cases.

items.reason: Short and mid-term listings while you secure a long-term rental.
Digital Dutch banking after address and BSN.
NOK and EUR movement and first-month cash flow.
Compare Dutch basic health insurance once you are resident.
